chat.title: Nyay Sahayak Legal Assistant
chat.subtitle: AI legal guidance, document analysis, and FIR support in one place
chat.example: Example: "My phone was stolen. What should I do?"
chat.initialExplanation: Hello. I am your legal assistant. You can ask about railway rules, property agreements, or stolen items.
chat.initialRule1: Ask a clear and specific question.
chat.initialRule2: You will get practical guidance for the Indian context.
chat.initialGuidance: If the matter is urgent, contact a lawyer or local authorities.
chat.loading: Fetching relevant legal context and preparing a response...
chat.disclaimer: AI guidance is not legal advice. For urgent matters, contact a lawyer or local authorities.
chat.errorMessage: The assistant is currently unavailable. Please try again later.
chat.errorGuidance: If the issue is urgent, consult a legal expert.
chat.privateModeSkipsSavingChatHistory: Private mode skips saving chat history.

fir.title: FIR / Complaint Generator
fir.subtitle: Describe your issue in simple language and generate a ready-to-submit complaint.
fir.placeholder: Write the incident details in simple language...
fir.describeComplaintHelp: Write what happened, when, where, and who was involved. Keep it simple.
fir.cardPlaceholder: For example, I paid Rs 12,000 for a job on 14 March and now they are not responding...

analysis.documentAnalysisSubtitle: Upload agreements, notices, or legal documents for OCR, privacy masking, and Gemini-powered risk analysis.
analysis.fileSizeExceeded: File size exceeds 15MB limit. Please upload a smaller file.
analysis.invalidFileType: Invalid file type. Please upload a PDF, image, or DOCX file.
analysis.pasteLegalTextOrInstructions: Paste legal text or add instructions for the uploaded document...

landing.heroHeadline: Don't just read contracts. Forensically analyze them.
landing.heroSubtitle: Nyay Sahayak uses advanced AI to strip away legal complexity, identifying hidden risks and predatory clauses in seconds.

howItWorks.headline: Three Steps to Safety
howItWorks.uploadDescription: Securely upload your PDF or image files. Our system immediately masks sensitive data to protect your privacy.
howItWorks.analysisDescription: Gemini AI scans every clause, identifying hidden risks and translating complex legal jargon into plain English.
howItWorks.clarityDescription: Review a high-level risk report or chat directly with the document to ask specific legal questions.

features.headline: Designed for Legal
features.subcopy: Precision auditing meets forensic intelligence. Identify risks, decode complexity, and summarize with atomic accuracy.
features.riskDetectionDesc: Instantly identify hidden liabilities and dangerous clauses before you sign.
features.legaleseDecoderDesc: Translate complex legal jargon into plain, actionable English.
features.smartSummarizationDesc: Get an executive summary of 50+ page documents in just 10 seconds.
features.interactiveAnalysisDesc: Chat directly with your documents about obligations, deadlines, or key dates.
features.forensicPrecisionDesc: Powered by Gemini AI, specifically tuned for structural legal document analysis.
features.enterpriseSecurityDesc: AES-256 protected and fully masked before analysis — total, verifiable privacy.

documentScanner.headline: Transform chaos into clarity.
documentScanner.analysisCopy: The document explicitly forces you to cover all future costs, even those out of your control. We strongly recommend renegotiating the indemnity clause.
documentScanner.highRiskCopy: Indemnity clause exposes you to severe financial risk.
documentScanner.safeCopy: NDA terms are standard industry practice and safe to sign.
documentScanner.footerHint: Hover to explore in 3D • Scroll down to scan

cinematic.headline: Welcome to Clarity.
cinematic.subcopy: The paper opens, the noise drops away, and the AI core becomes the only thing left in frame.
cinematic.status: STATUS: Scanning clauses for unbounded liability.

features.aiReviewDesc: A focused analysis layer for clause-by-clause scrutiny.
features.legalPrecisionDesc: Structured output that reads like a real legal workflow.

clauses.indemnityExplanation: You are responsible for paying the legal fees if your actions cause the company to get sued. This is standard for most contracts.
clauses.terminationExplanationPrefix: They can fire you or cancel this contract at any time, for no reason, with only
clauses.contentExplanation: You still own your content, but you are giving the platform permission to display and share it across their network.

aiAdvocate.subcopy: Upload any legal document, receipt, or agreement. Our AI advocate forensically scans for hidden risks instantly.
